heading: Consent of Theodore Roosevelt Association required for development
label: 9302 Consent of Theodore Roosevelt Association required for development

children.heading: .—General Plan for Development
children.label: a .—General Plan for Development
children.text: The Theodore Roosevelt Association must approve every general plan for the development of Theodore Roosevelt Island.

children.heading: .—Development Inconsistent With Plan
children.label: b .—Development Inconsistent With Plan
children.text: As long as the Association remains in existence, development inconsistent with the general plan may not be carried out without the Association’s consent.
